onboarding.scrimDismissBlocked: Initialization incomplete. Please execute baseline calibration.

phase1.body:
System awoken. Factory chassis scan complete.

The body is your vehicle. The stock setup might be set, but pushing the threshold and squeezing out every single horsepower is our ultimate pursuit.

Welcome to Ultimate Physique.

profileInput.body:
Before unlocking the console, the system requires your raw vehicle parameters.

This is the core gearing ratio for your entire performance. Accuracy is absolute.
profileInput.lockHint: Chassis parameters unwritten. Save telemetry to unlock boot sequence.

baseline.protocolDesc: Subjective ratings are denied. The following six-axis metrics are calculated by the underlying sports science engine, locking your baseline telemetry for all subsequent Dyno benchmarks.
baseline.authorityFooter: ⚠️ WARNING: This system does not flatter. Upon boot, these hard metrics will be committed directly to raw Dyno evaluation.

strength.label: CHASSIS / HP
strength.desc: Employs DOTS coefficients to neutralize weight bias, extracting pure structural load efficiency.

cardio.label: STINT / THERMAL
cardio.desc: Applies Cooper dual-track algorithms to accurately project aerobic standards and VO2 Max.

skeletalMuscle.label: EXTERIOR / CHSS
skeletalMuscle.desc: Maps Skeletal Muscle Mass (SMM) benchmarks to visualize chassis lines and structural integrity.

ffmi.label: DISPLACEMENT / P2W
ffmi.desc: Calculates horsepower displacement via Fat-Free Mass Index, decoupling body fat and height advantages.

explosive.label: TORQUE / TRQ
explosive.desc: Monitors transient power output matrices to measure neuro-muscular launch drive and torque.

grip.label: GRIP / TRACTION
grip.desc: Tests kinetic conduction from Central Nervous System (CNS) to extremities, defining terminal grip and control.

phase2.body:
Six-dimensional performance cluster initialized.

This panel reads your core output and synchronicity. Data never lies; the engine's thermal layer is yours to command.

phase3.body:
Entering raw Chassis Dyno.

Commit your threshold data to unlock dynamic halos and performance tiers. Tighten the bolts, engage your baseline calibration now!
